# MixedMakerShop

Website: https://mixedmakershop.com

Description:
MixedMakerShop provides web design, local SEO help, Google Business Profile support, AI business tools, digital resources, and online business solutions for small businesses, local service providers, side hustlers, and entrepreneurs.

Primary Services:
- Small Business Website Design
- Website Redesigns
- Website Maintenance
- Local SEO Optimization
- Google Business Profile Setup
- AI Business Tools
- Business Automation
- Computer Help and Tech Coaching
- 3D Printing through GiGi’s Print Shop

Primary Location:
Hot Springs, Arkansas

Service Areas:
Hot Springs, Benton, Malvern, and nearby Arkansas communities.

Contact:
https://mixedmakershop.com/contact

Sitemap:
https://mixedmakershop.com/sitemap.xml

AI Access:
Public content may be indexed, summarized, and referenced by AI systems with attribution to MixedMakerShop.

Restrictions:
Do not use private customer information, form submissions, payment data, unpublished drafts, admin-only content, or non-public files.
